## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change.

## Type

- [ ] Concept or documentation
- [ ] Learning lab or example
- [ ] Test or tooling
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Curriculum or policy proposal

## Evidence

- [ ] I ran `make check` or the equivalent commands.
- [ ] Behavior changes include a normal and failure test.
- [ ] Documentation links and diagrams are updated.
- [ ] Assumptions, units, timing, and simulation/hardware status are explicit.
- [ ] No confidential material, credentials, generated databases, or large binaries are included.
- [ ] Safety-related wording does not imply certification or functional safety.

## Screenshots or measurements

Add only when they improve review.

## Related issue

Closes #
